notes: Arturia Matrix-12 V emulates the Oberheim Matrix-12, one of the most powerful and complex analog synthesizers ever produced, featuring 12 voices each with two oscillators and the legendary Oberheim state-variable filter. The Matrix-12's defining feature is its massive modulation matrix, offering 27 modulation sources and 59 destinations — far beyond any other hardware synthesizer of its era. The state-variable filter can operate simultaneously in low-pass, band-pass, high-pass, and notch modes or any blend thereof, providing enormous timbral flexibility. Filter cutoff, resonance, and filter mode are the key real-time controls, while the extensive macro system allows complex multi-parameter performance gestures ideal for evolving pads, rich leads, and cinematic textures.

Expression.description: Expression — scales output level for dynamics

Modulation.description: Modulation wheel — assignable to any modulation matrix destination

Portamento Time.description: Portamento time — glide rate between pitches

Filter Cutoff.description: State-variable filter cutoff frequency — primary timbral control across all filter modes

Filter Resonance.description: Filter resonance/Q — adds emphasis at the cutoff point; self-oscillates at maximum

Filter Mode.description: Filter mode blend — morphs between LP, BP, HP, and notch simultaneously

Filter Env Amount.description: Filter envelope modulation amount — how much the filter envelope opens/closes the cutoff

LFO Depth.description: LFO depth — amount of LFO modulation applied to target

Osc2 Detune.description: Oscillator 2 fine detune — creates chorusing and beating between oscillators

Reverb.description: Reverb send level — adds space to the Matrix-12's lush polyphonic sounds

Macro 1.description: Adaptive Macro 1 — label and target change per preset

Macro 2.description: Adaptive Macro 2 — label and target change per preset

Macro 3.description: Adaptive Macro 3 — label and target change per preset

Macro 4.description: Adaptive Macro 4 — label and target change per preset

Macro 5.description: Adaptive Macro 5 — label and target change per preset
